title: Sanji Finds Mr. 3’s Hideout
description: On pages 1–4, sanji finds mr. 3’s hideout as sanji discovers Mr. 3’s hideout and uses a Den Den Mushi call to mislead Crocodile while the fight on Little Garden continues.
scene: Sanji Finds Mr. 3’s Hideout. Sanji discovers Mr. 3’s hideout and uses a Den Den Mushi call to mislead Crocodile while the fight on Little Garden continues. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Something's definitely strange. Really damn strange.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: don't tell me something happened to Nami and Vivi...!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If that's the case, then now's not the time for me to prepare cooking this lizard.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alright, I'll go look for them.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Heeeey! Say something back if you can hear me!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter how pissed off you are because as you can see, your friends have already been reduced to wax-figures.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: haha... Oh, I wonder about that... once miss golden week paints them,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: They'll sure to be excellent wax-dolls!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're far too late... so wallow in despair!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This is... the thing that was once used to take down a criminal whose bounty was worth 42 million bell.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: It's Mr. 3's greatest work of art!

summary: This part centers on sanji finds mr. 3’s hideout, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
